positive HBsAg or serum HBV-DNA | Healthy liver
All samples were obtained by liver biopsy and blood sampling, and liver tissues were preserved at -80℃. Liver tissue cRNA was extracted and processed by GeneChip Human Genome U133 Plus 2.0 Arrays.
Gene expression data from liver tissue of HBV infected patients | Gene expression data from liver tissue of healthy patients.

CEL files were performed by Affymetrix Expression Console. Probe set signals were normalized and summarized by the robust multi-array average (RMA) algorithm to adjust different batch effects. All samples passed quality control and were then annotated.
